canonical_definition: The model's internal activations are approximated by a sparse linear combination of learned feature vectors plus a bias term.
papers: Efficient Dictionary Learning with Switch Sparse Autoencoders
Towards Principled Evaluations of Sparse Autoencoders for Interpretability and Control
